title: OptiBlend
description:
The Ultimate Minecraft Optimization Modpack.
A carefully created mix of the popular "Fabulously Optimized" and "Simply Optimized" modpacks. Made for easy installation and top-notch performance, OptiBlend finds the perfect middle ground.
body:
## OptiBlend: The Ultimate Minecraft Optimization Modpack OptiBlend brings together the best features from the famous "Fabulously Optimized" and "Simply Optimized" modpacks. This modpack is carefully designed to offer an easy installation process and unmatched performance, combining optimization and convenience. Embark on a unique Minecraft adventure where crucial performance mods, network stack improvements, and thoughtfully chosen quality-of-life additions seamlessly come together. **UI: Title Screen** ![UI Picture of the game window, start screen](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/XADy2vaG/images/aa456a7c731dc6c44117476961442b103f74aff9.png) **Why Choose OptiBlend?** OptiBlend reflects my personal preference when it comes to Minecraft modpacks. I discovered that while the "Simply Optimized" modpack focused solely on optimization, it lacked the essential quality-of-life mods that I consider important. On the other hand, the "Fabulously Optimized" modpack included numerous quality-of-life mods, but some of them felt unnecessary or excessive to me.
Included mods: - advancementinfo-1.20-fabric0.83.0-1.4.jar - antighost-1.20-fabric0.83.0-1.1.5.jar - appleskin-fabric-mc1.20-2.5.0.jar - Barista-1.20-1.1.2-Fabric.jar - BetterF3-7.0.0-Fabric-1.20-pre6.jar - bettermounthud-1.2.2.jar - bobby-5.0.0.jar - c2me-fabric-mc1.20.1-0.2.0+alpha.10.91.jar - capes-1.5.2+1.20-fabric.jar - CITResewn-1.1.3+1.20.jar - cloth-config-11.0.99-fabric.jar - collective-1.20.1-6.62.jar - craftable_enchanted_golden_apple-1.0.6.jar - Debugify-1.20.1+1.1.jar - dynamic-fps-2.4.0.jar - enhancedblockentities-0.9+1.20.jar - entityculling-fabric-1.6.2-mc1.20.jar - Essential-fabric_1-19.jar - fabric-api-0.85.0+1.20.1.jar - fabric-language-kotlin-1.9.6+kotlin.1.8.22.jar - fastquit-3.0.0-beta.2+1.20+.jar - ferritecore-6.0.0-fabric.jar - guicompass-1.20.1-4.2.jar - ImmediatelyFast-1.1.15+1.20.1.jar - indium-1.0.18+mc1.20.jar - iris-mc1.20-1.6.4.jar - krypton-0.2.3.jar - lambdynamiclights-2.3.1+1.20.1.jar - language-reload-1.5.8+1.20.1.jar - lazydfu-0.1.3.jar - lithium-fabric-mc1.20.1-0.11.2.jar - memoryleakfix-fabric-1.17+-1.1.1.jar - modmenu-7.1.0.jar - morechathistory-1.19.1-1.1.1.jar - moreculling-1.20-0.18.1.jar - NoChatReports-FABRIC-1.20.1-v2.2.2.jar - peek-1.20.1-1.0.5.jar - PresenceFootsteps-1.9.0.jar - reeses_sodium_options-1.5.1+mc1.20-build.74.jar - sodium-extra-0.4.20+mc1.20-build.103.jar - sodium-fabric-mc1.20-0.4.10+build.27.jar - starlight-1.1.2+fabric.dbc156f.jar - tooltipfix-1.1.1-1.20.jar - vmp-fabric-mc1.20.1-0.2.0+beta.7.96-all.jar - yet-another-config-lib-fabric-3.0.3+1.20.jar - Zoomify-2.10.0.jar - Controlify-1.4.4+1.20.jar
